source:
A capacitor system that increases the energy production efficiency of Solar Panels.

§YSolar Panel§! Production: §G+2 Energy§! £energy


§YSolar Panel§! Upkeep: §R+1 Minerals§! £minerals  (for Gestalts) and  §R+1 Consumer Goods§! £consumer_goods£  (for Non-Gestalts)
